missions.name: Bunker Reclaim — Forward Position
missions.briefing:
Pilot. Forward MMC position on the rock has gone dark. Viroid signature confirmed inside the bunker. Objective: deploy lander with F, descend to surface, breach the hatch, neutralize hostiles room by room, walk out with the door still on its hinges. Cohort cannot dispatch hard at this range — that is why you are on contract. Hold the door. Make it ours.

— Sampaio, MMC

missions.name: Field Assay — Cohort Sample
missions.briefing: Pilot. Cohort needs an assay on target rock before the engineers green-light extraction. Deploy lander with F. Start the field terminal. Tag rocks with the SCI gun. Terminal flags the keeper. Return that sample, no other. No speculation, no delay. Make the data usable. — Sampaio, MMC

missions.name: Foundry Haul — Cohort Supply
missions.briefing: Pilot. Phobos foundry is running hot and the ore queue is shorter than I like. Deploy the lander with F, set down on the rock, open the cargo bay, and load until the gauge tops out. Foundry quote is by weight — partial holds bounce on the paperwork and I am not the one signing for a half-empty run. Bring it home clean. — Sampaio, MMC
